content.full_text:
June 5, 2000

Jonathan T. Smith
Senior Staff Counsel
San Francisco Bay Conservation and Development Commission
50 California Street, 26th Floor
San Francisco, CA 94111

Re: Your request for advice
    Our File No. 00-095

Dear Mr. Smith:

Pursuant to our telephone conversation on June 2, 2000, your request for advice dated April 21, 2000, assigned our file No. 00-095, has been withdrawn. No advice will be issued.

If your request for advice was withdrawn in error or if you need further assistance, please feel free to contact me at (916) 322-5660.

Sincerely,

Luisa Menchaca
Assistant General Counsel

By: John Vergelli
Staff Counsel, Legal Division
